title: astragalus delutulus
intro: Astragalus delutulus, also known as the little milk-vetch, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which help the body to adapt to stress and regulate the immune system. The medicinal properties of Astragalus delutulus are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's ability to fight off infections. In herbal preparations, Astragalus delutulus can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
